name: No witnesses to my fall at work in Midvale, still claim?
description: Yes, medical report proves; document thoroughly.[1]

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, your report + medical + circumstantial evidence suffices.[1] Key factors: Doctor corroborates; timely report.[1][5] Photos, logs help.[5]
